3261930.name: MEMOLOGY: War of Memes Demo
3261930.description:
Dr Livesey vs Banana Cat? Chad vs Sanik? What the hell is this?

MEMOLOGY: War of Memes is just a new part of the legendary MEMOLOGY series of games, in which you have to build your own personal army of meme characters!

Distribute your budget, pay attention to the characters' characteristics, build your meme army and just enjoy this madness. We hope that you completed all parts of MEMOLOGY and become the best meme commander!

Differences between the DEMO and the main game:

  • 2 instead of 5+ different and unique locations for battles

  • fewer recognizable characters from memes unlike the main game

  • lacks a well-thought-out story campaign

How the DEMO is similar to the main version (not DEMO):

  • Adjustable Combat Speed

  • Complete madness and unpredictability

    So which meme will win? It's up to you!
